_comment: iOS-specific config. Game code lives in src/ + style.css + index.html. To enable live-load from Vercel during dev: uncomment server.url. MUST be removed/commented before App Store submission.
_warning: NEW CHAT? READ /IOS_CONTINUITY.md AT REPO ROOT FIRST. ios.contentInset MUST stay 'never' — changing it brings back the home-indicator black strip. backgroundColor MUST stay #050614 at both top-level and ios.backgroundColor. Baseline tag: ios-baseline-working (commit d7e7824).
